name: inferlane
description: Cost-aware compute fuel gauge for Claude Code. Auto-tracks real usage from your transcript, budgets by provider, local-first dashboard at http://localhost:7070 — no API key needed.

api_key.description: InferLane API key (optional — local fuel gauge works without one). Needed only for cross-device sync. Get one at https://inferlane.dev/dashboard/settings

monthly_budget.description: Total monthly budget across all providers in USD (e.g. 100). Leave blank to track spend without a cap.

anthropic_budget.description: Per-provider monthly budget for Anthropic in USD. Leave blank to skip the per-provider gauge row.

openai_budget.description: Per-provider monthly budget for OpenAI in USD. Leave blank to skip.

google_budget.description: Per-provider monthly budget for Google/Gemini in USD. Leave blank to skip.

dashboard_port.description: Port for the local fuel-gauge dashboard (http://localhost:PORT/dashboard). Default 7070.
